dairy-free-green-bean-casserole.name: Dairy-free Green Bean Casserole
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190°C).
Bring a small pot of water to a boil, then place a strainer over the top. Add the green beans to the strainer, cover, and steam for 10-15 minutes, or until fork-tender. Set aside.
Heat a drizzle of olive oil in a medium pot over medium heat. Once the oil begins to shimmer, add the onion. Cook for 2 minutes, or until semi-translucent.

Add the mushrooms and cook for 5-6 minutes, until they have released the majority of their juices. Add 2 tablespoons of olive oil, the garlic, and soy sauce. Cook for 2-3 minutes, until the garlic is fragrant.
Stir in the flour to make a roux, then season with salt and pepper.
While stirring continuously, pour in the non-dairy milk and bring to a boil. Cook for 4-5 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Stir in the green beans and ½ cup (75 g) of the fried onions, until combined. Transfer to a medium baking dish and sprinkle on the remaining cup of fried onions.
Bake for 20 minutes, or until bubbling.
Serve warm.
Enjoy!

date-and-nut-bars.name: Date And Nut Bars
instructions: In a small bowl, pour boiling water over dates, and set aside to cool. Preheat oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Grease a 10x10 inch baking pan.

In a medium bowl, cream together the shortening and white sugar. Add eggs, one at a time, beating after each addition. Add the dates, including any water; mix well. Sift together the flour, cinnamon, salt, nutmeg, and baking soda; stir into the date mixture. Then stir in the nuts.
Spread the mixture evenly into the prepared 10x10 inch pan, and bake for 45 minutes in the preheated oven. When cool, cut into bars, and roll each bar in confectioners' sugar.

deconstructed-spam-musubi.name: Deconstructed Spam Musubi

ingredients.item: Low-sodium canned luncheon meat (such as spam®)

instructions: Mix sugar, soy sauce, and oyster sauce together in a resealable gallon-sized bag. Add Spam and seal the bag; turn the bag, gently squeezing to coat Spam. Marinate for at least 1 hour.
Bring water to a boil; add rice. Return to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer until liquid is absorbed and rice is tender, about 15 minutes. Stir vinegar into rice until combined.
When the rice is almost finished cooking, heat a skillet over medium-high heat. Add Spam and marinade. Cook, stirring frequently, until Spam is browned and marinade is absorbed, about 5 minutes.
Stir rice and seaweed together in a bowl; add luncheon meat and mix well.

deep-fried-dandelions.name: Deep-fried Dandelions
instructions: Wash dandelions under cool running water and dry on paper towels. Remove the green tendrils behind each flower. Set aside.

Mix together flour, curry powder, and salt in a small bowl or measuring cup. Beat egg in a large bowl; stir in flour mixture until smooth. Pour in beer; mix until batter is similar to runny pancake batter. Add more beer if batter is too thick.
Heat oil in a small saucepan to 191°C (190 degrees C). If you don't have a thermometer, heat oil until it begins to shimmer.
Working in batches, dip dandelion flowers into batter, then gently drop in hot oil and fry until golden, about 3 minutes. Transfer cooked flowers to crumpled paper towels or a wire rack; serve warm.

delicious-baked-rigatoni-with-meatballs-.name: Delicious Baked Rigatoni With Meatballs
delicious-baked-rigatoni-with-meatballs-.original_name: Delicioso rigatoni al horno con albóndigas caseras

ingredients.item: 250 gr de carne molida mixta (res y cerdo)
300 gr de salsa de tomate casera o de buena calidad
Un toque de nuez moscada y hojuelas de chile ((opcional))

instructions: Cocinar el rigatoni en abundante agua con sal, retirando 2 minutos antes de que quede al dente. Escurrir y reservar.
In a bowl, mix ground meat, egg, frosted bread, parmesan, garlic, parsley, salt, pepper and nutmeg. To form small meatballs the size of a nut.
Warm up a frying pan with olive oil and seal the meatballs till golden them out. No need to cook them completely because they will end up in the oven.
At an oven-suitable fountain, place a fine layer of tomato sauce. Add rigatoni mixed with the rest of the salsa.
Incorporate the meatballs into the dough. Cover with mozzarella pitted.
Bake at 200 been 3 been for 20 minutes, until cheese melts and gratines slightly.
Servir caliente.

delicious-curd-pudding-teleculinaria.name: Delicious Curd Pudding
instructions: Start the oven at 160 degrees. Tap the yolks slightly with the eggs and sugar. Add the curd and almond and stir well.
Unte com caramelo uma forma de pudim com capacidade para 1,5 l. Deite o preparado anterior na forma e leve ao forno, em banho-maria, durante 50 minutos.
Stick a stick to see if the pudding is cooked. Remove and let it cool down before deforming. Serve decorated with more caramel and physalis.

delicious-mango-gazpacho-comedera.name: Delicious Mango Gazpacho

ingredients.item: Pepino y mango en cubitos para decorar

instructions: We're gonna start our recipe by pounding his mango and cutting them into cubes.
Toma el pimiento, la cebolla y los vas a cortar en cubos.
In a blender, you'll add mango cubes, pepper, garlic tooth and onion.
Later you will add cucumber, yogurt and vegetable stock and have salt and pepper.
It's good till everything's perfectly integrated.
Now, add olive oil slowly while the blender's in motion. Cover well and high power for another minute.
Termina y deja reposar en la nevera por media hora aproximadamente.
Sirve en una taza y decora con el mango pepino en cubos.

delicious-philly-cheesesteak-sandwich-st.name: Delicious Philly Cheesesteak Sandwich Step By Step
delicious-philly-cheesesteak-sandwich-st.original_name: Rico sándwich Philly Cheesesteak paso a paso
instructions: Pica la carne de ternera en tiras cortas y un medianamente delgadas. Coloca en un bol y condimenta con sal y pimienta al gusto. Deja marinar por 10 minutos.
Take the onion, cut into medium strips or Jolian type. Warm up a frying pan with butter and once melting, add onion. Skip for 2 minutes and then add the sugar.
Mezcla y cocina a fuego medio hasta que se caramelice. Apaga y reserva.
Toma el queso cheddar, puedes rallarlo o cortar en rebanadas.
Ahora, toma los panes y haz un corta a lo largo. Reserva.

Warm up a frying pan or pan with some olive oil. Once at temperature, it incorporates beef and pits from 7 to 10 minutes while still moving. The meat should stay well juicy or at the cooking you prefer.
Toma los panes y una con mantequilla. Coloca en una plancha para que derrita y tueste un poco.
When butter has been melted and bread is a little golden, soon filled with meat, caramelized onion and adds cheeddar cheese to melt.
Filling the sandwich with some mayonnaise and ready, you can taste.

dessert-crepes-with-raspberry-sorbet.name: Dessert Crepes With Raspberry Sorbet
instructions: Heat 1/4 water and 3 tablespoons sugar in a saucepan over medium heat until mixture is simmering and sugar is dissolved. Remove from heat and allow syrup to cool to room temperature.

Place raspberries in the bowl of a food processor; pulse until pureed. Pour cooled syrup into raspberry puree and mix well. Strain through a fine-meshed sieve into a container. Cover with plastic wrap and freeze until firm, at least 2 1/2 hours. Break up with a fork and place back in the freezer.
Combine eggs, milk, 1/2 cup water, and 3 tablespoons melted butter in a bowl; beat with an electric mixer until smooth and creamy. Add flour and salt and mix until batter is smooth.

Grease a 9-inch nonstick skillet with 1 teaspoon butter over medium heat. Pour a small ladleful of batter into the skillet. Immediately rotate the skillet until batter coats the cooking surface in a thin layer. Cook until the top of the crepe is no longer wet and the bottom has turned light brown, 1 to 2 minutes. Run a spatula around the edge of the skillet to loosen crepe; flip crepe and cook until the other side has turned light brown, about 1 minute more. Slide ready crepe onto a warmed plate and keep warm. Repeat with remaining batter.
Arrange crepes on plates and dust with confectioners' sugar. Place a scoop of raspberry sorbet on the side and garnish with apple slices, fresh mint leaves, and red currants.

deviled-shrimp-a-unique-recipe-comedera.name: Deviled Shrimp, A Unique Recipe
deviled-shrimp-a-unique-recipe-comedera.original_name: Camarones a la diabla, una receta única

ingredients.item: 450 g large, clear and devoured shrimp

instructions: Vamos a iniciar nuestra receta, preparando todos los ingredientes.
Now, heat up a frying pan with high fire.
The Jalapeño chilies are roasted and their crusts are put together. When you look at them with that look, you'll remove his skin.
Cola in a blender, jalapeno chilies. The tipple chili with some water. He's high till a bad sauce forms.
In a bowl, you will add the shrimp already clear and devoured with some olive oil. Mix.
Now, you'll add the cumin and salt and pepper to his taste. Mix to full season. Reserve.
In a frying pan, you will place some oil, and then garlic and drink. Once I'm cold, add his tomato purée. Let cook for 5 minutes with soft heat.
It's time to put in the salsa of roasted and chipotle chilies, remove and let cook for another 5 minutes.
It's turn to add shrimp, mix and let cook for 10 minutes till they're ready.
Enjoy!

dilly-rolls.name: Dilly Rolls
instructions: Gently heat milk until warm to the touch (an instant-read thermometer should register 120°–130°). Add sugar and yeast and whisk to combine. Add buttermilk; let sit until yeast starts to foam, 5–10 minutes.

Combine onion, fresh dill, dill seeds, salt, and 2½ cups flour in a large bowl. Stir in milk mixture and 2 Tbsp. butter, adding more flour as needed (dough will initially be fairly wet), until a sticky dough forms. Turn out onto a lightly floured surface and knead until dough is smooth and elastic, about 5 minutes.

Transfer dough to a lightly buttered bowl and cover with plastic wrap. Let rise in a warm, draft-free area until doubled in size, about 1 hour. Punch down dough and let rise until doubled again, about 1 hour. Punch down dough, and, using a pastry scraper, divide into 12 pieces.

Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and lightly butter top. Cupping your hand over and using your palm, roll each piece of dough on work surface into a ball and place on prepared baking sheet, spacing at least 2” apart (you need to leave enough room so that they’re not touching after they’ve risen). Brush tops with remaining 2 Tbsp. butter and cover loosely with plastic wrap; let rise until doubled in size, 20–30 minutes.
Meanwhile, preheat oven to 400°.
Bake rolls until puffed and deep golden brown on the tops and bottoms, 15–20 minutes. Transfer to a wire rack and let cool slightly before serving.
DO AHEAD: Rolls can be made 3 hours ahead. Reheat before serving, if desired.

dougs-crawfish-pie.name: Doug's Crawfish Pie

ingredients.item: Cooked and peeled whole crawfish tails
Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Melt butter in a large skillet on medium heat, then stir in flour; cook until light brown, about 10 minutes. Add sweet onion, green pepper, celery, and green onions. Cover and simmer on low heat for about one hour, stirring occasionally.

Stir in vegetable broth and tomato paste, and cook until it reaches a creamy consistency. Mix in crawfish tails, garlic, and parsley, then cook for about 15 minutes or until the tails are tender. Stir in salt, black pepper, cayenne pepper, and hot sauce.

Preheat an oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Bake the puff pastry shells for 5 to 7 minutes, or until they puff up and start to brown a little. Remove from oven and set aside to cool. Pull off center tops and save. Turn oven down to 177°C (175 degrees C).

Spoon mixture into puff pastry shells until slightly overfilled. Put extra filling into a pie dish and cover with the remaining puff pastry shell center tops to create 6 small pies and 1 large crawfish pie. Place pies on a baking sheet.
Bake for about 15 minutes, or until the shells are golden brown and the filling has a nice shine to it.

dream-recipe-with-5-ingredients-teleculi.name: Dream Recipe With 5 Ingredients
instructions: Lay the water, the margarine and a pinch of salt in a pot and lead to the boiling heat. Add the flour, in rain and always stirring, until you get a ball of dough that takes off from the pot. Remove from the fire, transfer to a bowl and let it cool.
Add the eggs, one by one and kneading very well in a movement of opening and closing hands.
Heat a pot with abundant oil (without letting too much heat) and fry small spoonfuls of dough. Remove and drain on absorbent paper.
Involve some sugar and cinnamon powder and pass the dreams through this mixture. Serve right away.

dried-cherry-bread.name: Dried Cherry Bread
instructions: Pour boiling water to cover dried cherries in a bowl; let sit to plump up for 15 minutes. Drain.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease and flour a 9x5-inch loaf pan.
Lightly beat eggs in a bowl; whisk in sugar, yogurt, oil, butter, buttermilk, and vanilla extract to combine.

Whisk flour, oatmeal, baking powder, baking soda, and salt together in a separate, larger bowl; add egg mixture, white chocolate chips, and cherries. Stir until just combined. Don't overmix. Pour into the prepared pan.

Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, 45 to 60 minutes, checking at 35 minutes to account for different ovens. If bread begins to brown too much, lightly cover the top with aluminum foil. Cool in the pan 5 to 10 minutes before inverting loaf onto a wire rack to cool completely.

duck-bigarade.name: Duck Bigarade

ingredients.item: Basic duck stock or chicken stock
Shot glass grand marnier or other orange liqueur

instructions: Remove the duck breasts from the refrigerator, salt them well, and set them aside at room temperature for 30 minutes.

Pan sear the duck breasts. You may have to do this in batches. When the breasts are cooked, set them aside skin side up on a cutting board and let them rest, tented with aluminum foil, while you make the sauce.

To make the sauce, pour off all but about 2 tablespoons of the fat from the pan and place the pan over medium heat. Sprinkle the flour into the pan and stir to combine and make a roux. Let it cook, stirring occasionally, for 4 to 5 minutes, until it is the color of coffee with cream.

Add a pinch of salt and stir to combine, then slowly stir in the stock, orange juice, liqueur, and vinegar. Everything will spatter at first, but it will calm down. Add any accumulated juices from the duck to the sauce. Let this boil down until it is a little thinner than the consistency of Thanksgiving gravy. Add the sugar, then taste and adjust with salt. If you want a more refined sauce, pour it through a fine-mesh sieve into a bowl.
To serve, slice the breasts. Spoon some sauce on each plate and top with breast slices. Garnish with the orange zest and orange slices.

duels-and-losses-from-la-mancha-the-reci.name: Duels And Losses From La Mancha, The Recipe Of Don Quixote De La Mancha
duels-and-losses-from-la-mancha-the-reci.original_name: Duelos y Quebrantos manchegos, la receta de Don Quijote de la Mancha

ingredients.item: 2 slices of established bread (from the previous day)

instructions: Cortamos las dos rebanadas de pan. Hacemos igual con los dos chorizos y la panceta, todo en trozos no muy grandes.

In a large frying pan, we heated an extra virgin olive oil with medium heat. First we have to add the clawed pancet and the two choricas. We let them cook for a few minutes till they drop their fat and start to get golden.
We put the two cuts of bread into the frying pan with the flesh, stirring well so that the bread will be drenched from the juices and slightly felt.

We have built up the 5 scrambled eggs with a pint of salt and ground black pepper to taste and frying pan. We lower our temperature and mix them gently so that the egg will cover little by little. The secret to them to be perfect is that they are creamy and not too dry.
Once the eggs are at their point, we get out of the fire and we serve hot.

dulce-de-leche-swirled-banana-bread.name: Dulce De Leche Swirled Banana Bread
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350º F (175ºC).
Mix flour, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt in a bowl and mix well.
In a separate bowl, mash the bananas.
Add in butter and sugar, mix until smooth.
Add in eggs and yogurt, mix until well-combined.
Add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients, mix until smooth.
Pour the batter into a buttered/oil-sprayed loaf pan.
Drop dulce de leche on top of the batter, then swirl gently into the batter with the tip of the spoon or fork.
Bake it for an hour and cool completely.
Slice and enjoy!
